raw_consumer_statement: I had filed a previous complaint about the same issue and citibank had stated that they would provide me the representment documents but today XX/XX/24 I received a letter from citibank stating that they are denying my request for representment documents which I should be entitled to because I know 100 % that I did not make those charges so I believe thats the least that they can do for me when they have denied my fraud claim.
